text: Aaj team call pe colleague ko mere accent ka mazak udate suna, par mere paas bura manne ka waqt nahi hai kyunki login karke next sprint ki delivery deni hai. Ek divorced mother hone ke naate mujhe pata hai ki agar main break lungi toh EMI bounce ho jayegi aur bacchon ki school fees ruk jayegi. WFH isolation mein thak chuki hoon, par 'structural endurance' hi meri majboori hai kyunki rukna mere liye option hi nahi hai.

Mera accent unke liye joke hai, par mere liye ye din-raat ki coding ka nishaan hai jo main bacchon ki parvarish ke liye kar rahi hoon taaki unhe samaj se exclude na hona pade. IT sector mein itna competition hai ki main rona afford nahi kar sakti, bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon kyunki mujh par poore khandaan ki zimmedari hai. Main thak kar choor hoon par mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta.

Colleague ke tano ke baad dil toh kiya ki laptop band kar doon, par phir yaad aaya ki home loan ki kist baki hai aur main akeli hi breadwinner hoon. Divorcee hone ki wajah se pehle hi 'log kya kahenge' ka darr rehta hai, isliye main apni insult bhool kar bas client deadlines poori karne mein lagi hoon. Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti, bas endurance hi meri pehchaan ban gayi hai.

Startup ki deadlines ke beech jab accent ka mazak uda toh laga sab chhod doon, par bacchon ke future ke liye mujhe ye sab peena padta hai. Widowed hone ke baad samaj ki nazrein pehle hi badal gayi hain, isliye main double shift karti hoon taaki koi ye na kahe ki main kamzor hoon. Main exhausted hoon par mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai kyunki mera 'duty-based' kirdaar hi mere bacchon ki dhaal hai.

Logon ke mazak aur WFH isolation ne mujhe andar se tod diya hai, par bacchon ki schooling aur unki izzat ke liye main har din login karti hoon. Main ek single mother hoon aur hamare samaj mein ek galti bhi 'divorce stigma' ko badha deti hai, isliye main bas bina ruke kaam karti hoon. Mera sharir bol raha hai ki ruk jao, par mera 'farz' kehta hai ki main afford nahi kar sakti ki bacchon ko koi financial kami mehsus ho.
